mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe where recommend = 1

SELECT r.*, m.nickname, c.category_name FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id JOIN food f ON r.food_id = f.food_id JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id WHERE recipe_id = #{num}
SELECT r.* FROM recipe ORDER BY created_date DESC
SELECT DISTINCT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN ingredient i ON r.recipe_id = i.recipe_id JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE i.ingredient_name LIKE #{pattern}

SELECT DISTINCT r.*, f.food_name FROM recipe_view r LEFT JOIN food f ON r.food_id = f.food_id LEFT JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id
REPLACE(c.category_name, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{category}, ' ', '')
AND CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) <= #{maxCookTime}
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(r.cooking_time, '분', '') AS UNSIGNED) ASC
ORDER BY r.created_date DESC

SELECT f.food_id AS foodId, f.food_name AS foodName, f.category_id AS categoryId FROM food f JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id WHERE REPLACE(c.category_name, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{categoryName}, ' ', '') ORDER BY f.food_name ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM food f JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id WHERE REPLACE(c.category_name, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{categoryName}, ' ', '')
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT count(*) FROM recipe WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.created_date DESC) AS rank_num, r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY r.created_date DESC LIMIT 5;
select r.*, c.category_name, f.food_name from recipe_view r join food f on r.food_id = f.food_id join category c on c.category_id = f.category_id where r.recipe_id = #{recipe_id}
mapper.update: update recipe set status = #{status} where recipe_id = #{recipe_id}
update recipe set recommend = #{recommend} where recipe_id = #{recipe_id}
mapper.select: select r.*, m.nickname from recipe r join member m on r.member_id = m.member_id where recommend = 1 order by r.created_date desc, r.recipe_id desc LIMIT 10

SELECT r.recipe_id, r.title, r.food_id, r.cooking_time, r.view_count, r.like_count, r.created_date, r.updated_date, r.thumbnail, r.difficulty, r.status, m.nickname, m.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickName, i.ingredient_id, i.ingredient_name, i.quantity, i.unit, i.type, c.cook_order_id, c.cook_order, c.cook_image, c.description FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN ingredient i ON r.recipe_id = i.recipe_id LEFT JOIN cook_order c ON r.recipe_id = c.recipe_id WHERE r.recipe_id = #{recipeId}
SELECT food_id AS foodId, food_name AS foodName FROM food ORDER BY food_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe( title, member_id, food_id, cooking_time, thumbnail ) VALUES( #{title}, #{memberId}, #{foodId}, #{cooking_time}, #{thumbnail} )
INSERT INTO ingredient( ingredient_name, quantity, unit, recipe_id ) VALUES( #{ingredient_name}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{recipe_id} )
INSERT INTO cook_order( cook_order, description, cook_image, recipe_id ) VALUES( #{order}, #{description}, #{cook_image}, #{recipe_id} )
